must_detect.matched_text: This notice is governed by Singapore law; where SFA/SGX or MAS guidance applies, we prioritise prohibitions on false trading, market manipulation, and improper disclosure.

Privacy and Retention Workflow Notice — Ficus Meridian Ltd. (SG) with Cedar Reef Capital Pte. Ltd.
Scope: We process personal data under the PDPA for SG law-firm and listed-company support (M&A, employment, and capital-markets), and we operate controls for SFA/SGX market conduct obligations.
Collection: We collect work emails, role titles, and business card information from counterparties, event RSVPs, and marketing sign-ups for ESG/climate and crypto education webinars; we do not collect NRIC/FIN unless strictly required by law.
Form labels used in templates may include “Government ID (masked): XXXXX0000X”, “Wallet alias (non-custodial): demo-abc123”, and “Insider-list role: Legal/Finance”; these fields are illustrative and not linked to identifiable individuals in training materials.
DSAR: Submit access/correction requests to dpo@ficusmeridian.example; we may request verification limited to company badge or work email domain, consistent with PDPA requirements.
Transfers: Data may be processed by JurisWorks APAC Pte. Ltd. (SG) and Cloudia BV (NL) under PDPC Model Contractual Clauses; cross-border transfers comply with the Transfer Limitation Obligation and comparable protection standards.
Retention: Routine HR files, marketing contact logs, and tabletop cyber incident drill notes are retained 2–3 years; insider-list templates, blackout approvals, and information-barrier attestations are retained no less than 5 years post-event in line with SFA/SGX expectations.
Security: We maintain separate repositories for commercial-term playbooks and for crypto product names used in marketing-only content; legal operations have no access to production trading systems.
Training materials include benign examples of “tipping,” “blackout,” and “information-barrier” phrasing to improve staff awareness, and do not reference live issuers or live deal codenames.
We do not process biometric identifiers, precise geolocation, or private keys in these workflows; any crypto wallet strings shown in examples are non-functional and for formatting only.
Employment context: Staff may be added to an insider-list due to their role; only role descriptions are visible internally, not personal contact details.
Positive MNPI example (restricted access): A draft insider list exists for a proposed share placement by Ficus Meridian Ltd. that has not been announced on SGX; access is limited to Corporate Secretariat and External Counsel.
Public/stale information such as previously announced sustainability-linked bond frameworks or past cyber incident advisories is used for training and FAQs without containing MNPI.
This notice is governed by Singapore law; where SFA/SGX or MAS guidance applies, we prioritise prohibitions on false trading, market manipulation, and improper disclosure.
